properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We were often consumed by the world, That sometimes we forget your word, A prompt of grace from above In imperfections we find love, But deep in our hearts recall that were his part.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh Lord, keep us in your arms, Let us feel your warmth, Your sufficient grace is all we should embrace Oh Lord, mould as us you are, Test us through the fire, Imperfect but made perfect by you.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When the shadow and doubts starts to fall, But then, we hear a voice that gently calls, A prompt of grace from above in imperfections we find love, Through struggles we have grown it's a victory that we own.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Everyday though our flesh is tested Through the word's quickening power Our weaknesses well become our testimony

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh Lord through your saving grace, We're victorious in this race, He knows us well In him we will dwell.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Oh Lord, mould as us your are, Test us through the fire, Imperfect but made perfect by you (2×), Not by mine but by your spirit Lord.
